title: dcg-vy2.2
description:
Update all 11 partial plan docs to reconcile with actual implementation:

Docs to update:
- 01-treesitter-integration-test-harness.md
- 02-matching-framework.md
- 02-matching-framework-test-harness.md
- 03c-packs-infra-cloud.md
- 03c-packs-infra-cloud-test-harness.md
- 03d-packs-containers-k8s.md
- 03d-packs-containers-k8s-test-harness.md
- 05-testing-and-benchmarks.md
- 05-testing-and-benchmarks-test-harness.md

For each doc:
1. Remove the OLD (first) Completion Signoff section that has stale gap data from pre-c9c round
2. Update any references to internal/testharness -> e2etest
3. Add a mapping note or update doc-specified identifiers to match actual code names where they diverged (e.g. CommandMatcher -> MatchFunc DSL, test name renames)
4. Do NOT rewrite the entire doc — just add reconciliation notes or update the specific identifiers that changed

Note: 03a, 03a-th, 03b, 03b-th, 03e, 03e-th, 03f, 03g already have Status: Complete — skip those.

comments.author: Danny Cosson
comments.text: Completed in commit 3a8058b. All 9 docs reconciled.
